name: DIVERSIFIED HEALTHCARE TRUST
summary: Diversified Healthcare Trust (DHC) is a Maryland-organized REIT that owns senior living communities, medical office and life science properties, wellness centers, and other healthcare-related real estate across the United States. As of December 31, 2025, DHC owned 298 properties in 33 states and Washington, D.C., and held equity interests in two unconsolidated joint ventures owning approximately 2.2 million rentable square feet of medical office and life science properties.
